creator: Artur@proginet.com
text:
I just installed the system and this is the error that comes up every 30 seconds , Please help me. I am not the best with unix platforms, so it is kind of hard for me to fix it .

Fix: 

I think the serial device is being acctivated ; however , it doesnot exist in the computer (modem) I think I need to disable "getter" , I don't know how ....
Is there a mode where those messages don't comeup ...???
